pages.title: Damage order
pages.text: Vanilla armor and enchantments apply first. Then Glyphbound checks fatal wards, ink wound, custom reductions, and final received damage.$(br2)жЂ’ counts final damage after those reductions. This prevents double counting.

pages.title: еїЌ: delay burst
pages.text: Position: converts part of incoming damage into ink wound. If you go 2 seconds without taking more damage, the stored damage starts ticking down as magic damage.$(br2)Taking another hit delays settlement and adds to the pool.

pages.title: еїЌ tiers
pages.text: Wood delays 25%, pool cap 6$(br)Stone 35%, cap 8$(br)Copper 45%, cap 10$(br)Iron 55%, cap 14$(br)Gold 60%, cap 12$(br)Diamond 65%, cap 18$(br)Netherite 70%, cap 20$(br2)Ink wound settlement is small repeated magic damage, giving е‡Ђ, ж•‘, or жЃЇ time to answer.

pages.title: е‡Ђ: clean debt
pages.text: Position: emergency cleanup. е‡Ђ removes negative effects and reduces stored ink wound.$(br2)Use it after еїЌ has bought time. It is not a shield; if new damage keeps arriving, you still need positioning or a rescue glyph.

pages.title: е‡Ђ tiers
pages.text: Wood clears 1 negative effect, 4 ink wound$(br)Stone 1, 6$(br)Copper 2, 8$(br)Iron 3, 12$(br)Gold 3, 14$(br)Diamond 4, 18$(br)Netherite 5, 22
